title: WTP Advisory x FLI: How can strategic sales management boost your sales? – Hanoi
metaDescription: An exclusive FDI enterprise solutions workshop on strategic sales management for businesses in northern Vietnam, presented by WTP Advisory with the Frontier Leader Institute (FLI).
about: Join us on September 19th, 2024, in Hanoi for an exclusive workshop designed to elevate your sales team's performance. In collaboration with the Frontier Leader Institute (FLI), WTP Advisory proudly presents “How Can Strategic Sales Management Boost Your Revenue?”, led by Mrs. Thanh Lam, Former CEO of VinFast Europe.

This workshop offers actionable strategies and insights tailored for FDI companies in Vietnam, aimed at driving sustainable growth and securing your competitive edge in the dynamic market. Don't miss this opportunity to transform your sales approach and achieve long-term success.

details.label: Location
details.value: Floor 3, Aura Building, The Manor Central Park, Nguyen Xien Street, Dai Kim, Hoang Mai Ward, Hanoi City

bulletSections.heading: What You'll Learn
bulletSections.intro: Our comprehensive workshop series covers a range of customer-centric topics critical to your business.
items: Essential Leadership Skills — cultivate the qualities needed to inspire and guide your team towards organizational goals
Effective People Management — manage and motivate your workforce, fostering a productive and positive work environment
Dynamic Sales Strategies — develop cutting-edge techniques to boost your revenue and market presence
Exceptional Customer Relationship Management — enhance engagement and satisfaction through proven CRM practices
Efficient Project Management — deliver results on time and within budget
Resilient Crisis Management — navigate and mitigate crises to keep your business resilient

bulletSections.heading: What You'll Gain
items: Strategic Sales Leadership — develop winning sales strategies that drive measurable growth
High-Impact Team Management — advanced techniques to inspire and lead a top-performing sales team
Data-Driven Decision Making — use analytics to refine your approach and enhance sales outcomes
Deep Customer Insight — tailor your strategies to the nuances of the Vietnamese market

registration.heading: Reserve Your Spot
registration.subtitle: Join the Frontier Leadership Institute's exclusive workshop series and take the first step towards transforming your business.
